title: ModelNarrationOutput
description: ROOT SCHEMA for the renderer model's return value ONLY (gate repair 2026-07-17: separated from the pipeline envelope). The model returns exactly this object: planReceipt + readerProse. Post-validation results never appear here; they live in the separate root schema penelope-narrative-pipeline-envelope.schema.json, which the deterministic post-validator assembles after generation. Private input types are never referenced by either schema. planReceipt and renderAudit field names may not appear inside readerProse text (deterministic check AC-SEP-02). Reader prose is never re-imported as next-turn world fact (AC-FID-02). This pass defines the shape of readerProse only; no prose instance exists. Status: agent_proposed, CREATOR REVIEW REQUIRED.

speechEventIds.description: IDs of typed speech events only (event kind verified by deterministic preflight). Non-dialogue roles carry an empty array. A licensed_dialogue entry must bind here or to a speech_act license — never to a general event (AC-DLG-01).

ReaderProse.description: Reader-facing English prose. Format definition only in this pass; no instance text is authored. Each paragraph binds to the sentence plans it realizes so the post-validator can align prose to authority without parsing meaning.

text.description: English prose only. May contain no engine values, IDs, rule codes, process vocabulary, or pipeline field names; enforced by the deterministic post-validator (AC-SEP-01/02), not by this schema.
